martha.name: Martha
martha.comment: Martha, looks like a great day for cycling, especially between 10:00 and 12:00 when the temperature is around 22°C and the wind is relatively calm. You might even drag Britt along for a ride. Just watch out for some noticeable headwind around 16 km/h, but it's nothing you can't handle.

britt.name: Britt
britt.comment: Britt, looks like today's the day to get the bike out — great conditions from 10:00 to 12:00, with ideal temps around 22°C and relatively calm wind. Just watch out for some noticeable headwind and don't forget the sunscreen. If Martha's free, maybe drag her along for a spin and then grab a drink on the terrace afterwards?
